message:
bd-3uqg.3.2: implement GitHub Copilot + Enterprise provider

Two-step auth flow: exchange GitHub OAuth/PAT token for Copilot session
token, then delegate to OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Session tokens are
cached with expiry margin. Enterprise supported via configurable base URL.

13 tests: 6 unit (struct/builder/deser), 5 VCR integration (token exchange,
caching, error, fallback endpoint, existing path), 2 routing (canonical +
alias).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
